channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: JUST IN: FIFA clears Balogun for USA-Belgium World Cup clash
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Folarin Balogun is cleared to play in the USA vs. Belgium World Cup Round of 16 match after FIFA overturned his controversial red card suspension.
Read More: https://punchng.com/just-in-fifa-clears-balogun-for-usa-belgium-world-cup-clash/

item.title: Australia romp past England to secure seventh Women's T20 World Cup title
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Australia dashed England's hopes of a first ICC Women's T20 World Cup win in 17 years and second overall as they romped to a seven-wicket victory at a packed-out Lord's to secure a record-extending seventh title.

item.title: Lagos residents ditch umbrellas for nylon raincoats as rainfall intensifies
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
As rainfall intensifies, Lagos residents are increasingly choosing affordable and convenient nylon raincoats over traditional umbrellas for better protecti
Read More: https://punchng.com/lagos-residents-ditch-umbrellas-for-nylon-raincoats-as-rainfall-intensifies/

item.title: Customs, Afreximbank forge fresh alliance to unlock Africa’s $3.4tn market
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Nigeria Customs Service and Afreximbank deepen partnership to unlock Africa’s $3.4tn market, accelerating intra-African trade and AfCFTA implementation.
Read More: https://punchng.com/customs-afreximbank-forge-fresh-alliance-to-unlock-africas-3-4tn-market/

item.title: Police arrest 202 suspects in Delta criminal hideouts, black spots raid
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Delta State Police Command arrests 202 suspects in a major raid on criminal hideouts and black spots, seizing drugs and vehicles.
Read More: https://punchng.com/police-arrest-202-suspects-in-delta-criminal-hideouts-black-spots-raid/

item.title: Buhari’s greatest legacy is investment in education — Aisha
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Aisha Buhari highlights her late husband’s greatest legacy: investment in education, as she unveils a new Computer Science Complex at Al-Qalam University.
Read More: https://punchng.com/buharis-greatest-legacy-is-investment-in-education-aisha/

item.title: Thieves steal around €4 million in jewellery from French museum
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: Jewellery worth several million euros has been stolen from the Lalique Museum in northeastern France after burglars broke into the site early on Sunday and targeted its jewellery collection. Around 20 pieces were taken in the raid, with losses estimated at close to four million euros, according to a

item.title: Troops Conduct 14,221 Operations, Eliminate 1,597 Criminals, Rescue 1,516 Hostages in Six Months
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: Linus Aleke in Abuja Troops across all theatres of operation conducted 14,221 security operations across the federation through coordinated land, air and maritime missions targeting terrorists, bandits, kidnappers, arms traffickers,

item.title: Iran's supreme leader absent as senior officials attend ayatollah's funeral
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: Mojtaba Khamenei has not been seen in public since the attack which killed his father at the outset of the US-Israel war with Iran.

item.title: Chacarra claims maiden LET title at Hulencourt Women's Open
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Carolina Chacarra won her maiden Ladies European Tour title by finishing on 12 under at the Hulencourt Women's Open in Belgium.

item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Senegal goalkeeper Mory Diaw publicly apologized to fans following his costly error in the 89th minute, which allowed Belgium to equalize during their 3-2 Round of 32 defeat at the FIFA World Cup 2026. Diaw stepping in for injured starter Edouard Mendy rushed off his line but failed to intercept a c

item.description: The Initiative for Research, Innovation and Advocacy in Development (IRIAD) has called on governments at all levels to abandon the country’s long-standing reactive approach to flooding and adopt preventive measures that address the root causes of recurring disasters. item.description: The invitational tournament is part of Nigeria’s preparations for the WAFU B U-17 Championship scheduled for September. The regional competition will also serve as the qualifying tournament for the 2027 Africa U-17 Cup of Nations.

This is as the Service also announced the rescue of 563 victims of trafficking in persons during the aforementioned

item.description: Ash Handley scored a hat-trick of tries and set up two others as Leeds Rhinos ran riot against rivals Bradford Bulls to secure a 50-16 victory at Hill Dickinson Stadium.

item.title: Sharon Osbourne pays emotional tribute to Ozzy on 46th wedding anniversary
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: “Today would have been our 46th wedding anniversary. Instead, it is a celebration of a love that even death could not diminish. I miss your hand in mine, but I carry your love with me every step of the way. Forever my husband. Forever my heart,” she wrote.

item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Charles Leclerc won a chaotic British Grand Prix for Ferrari as Kimi Antonelli's world championship lead was dramatically reduced after a technical issue left him outside the points.

item.title: Brazil vs Norway LIVE: FIFA World Cup 2026 – last 16
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Live coverage and text updates as Brazil play Norway in the round of 16 knockout stage.

item.title: Sharon Osbourne Honours Late Husband Ozzy On What Would Have Been Their 46th Wedding Anniversary
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Sharon Osbourne has honoured her late husband, Ozzy Osbourne, with a heartfelt tribute on what would have been their 46th wedding anniversary. Taking to Instagram on Friday, July 4, Sharon shared a touching close-up photo of the couple holding hands and reflected on their enduring love despite his p

item.title: Hero’s Welcome As Cape Verde Return Home After Historic World Cup Run
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: Cape Verde’s national team received a hero’s welcome on their return home after an unforgettable debut campaign at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, where they emerged as one of the tournament’s biggest surprise packages. The Blue Sharks captured the hearts of football fans around the world

item.title: Newcastle sign Toure for £43m - what will he bring to club?
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Newcastle United reporter Ciaran Kelly looks at why the club have bought forward Bazoumana Toure from Hoffenheim for £43m.

item.title: Cape Verde erupts as Blue Sharks return home to heroes’ welcome after World Cup run
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Cape Verde exploded in celebration on Sunday as thousands of ecstatic fans welcomed the Blue Sharks back home after their historic 2026 FIFA World Cup campaign.

item.title: How Nigerian sprinter, Ajayi shocked World Champion Seville to win Prefontaine classic 100m
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Nigerian sprint sensation KanyinsolaAjayi produced the performance of his career on Saturday, storming to victory in the men's 100m event at the 2026 Prefontaine Classic in Eugene, Oregon, United States.

item.title: Prince Nazir Ado Ibrahim: A tribute, By Femi Fani-Kayode
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: Sadly we did not spend much time together in the last few years and were only in touch from time to time but when I heard of your passing something broke in me… I realised that you were literally the living symbol of my lost childhood and the rallying point and star of those of […] The p

item.title: Investors with $5M+ are done being landlords — and one passive strategy pays 10% to 12% 'easy money'
item.dc:creator: Yahoo Finance

item.title: Police Arrest 202 Suspects In Asaba Crime Raids
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: The Delta State Police Command has arrested 202 suspects during intelligence-led raids on criminal hideouts and other black spots across the Asaba metropolis. The command’s spokesperson, SP Bright Edafe, said in a statement on Sunday that the operation was led by the Deputy Commissioner of Pol

item.title: Nigerian Creators Promoting Major Artists For Free, Caesar Vibez Is One Of Most Documented Cases
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: A pattern has emerged within Nigeria’s digital creator economy that has received limited analytical attention despite its visibility across major social media platforms: independent content creators are producing promotional content for established recording artists without formal contracts, w

item.title: Sanusi canvasses for more collaboration between government, Private sector in Aviation sector
item.dc:creator: BusinessDay
item.description: Ado Sanusi, the Chief Executive Officer of Aero Contractors, has said that if there is constructive collaboration between the federal read more Sanusi canvasses for more collaboration between government, Private sector in Aviation sector
